title: April pipeline pacing tracks at $1.18M versus $1.5M target by week 3

trace: Pipeline pacing signal from paid channels shows 79% completion rate by week 3, with demo request volume up 38% month-over-month.

title: LinkedIn CPL holds at $138 while March climbed 12%

trace: CPL efficiency improved despite industry-wide inflation, correlating with audience refresh timing.
